name: Sri Lanka Ala Badun Potatoes & Onion
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and cut the potatoes into bite-sized pieces.
2. Slice the onion.
3. In a bowl, combine the potato pieces with salt, turmeric, chile powder, and paprika.
4. Heat oil in a pan until hot. Add curry leaves, then the onions. Fry until golden brown.
5. Add mustard seeds and cinnamon stick to the frying onions.
6. Once the onions are golden brown, add the potatoes to the pan and toss with the onion until evenly browned and heated through.
7. Remove the cinnamon stick before serving.
8. Sprinkle lime juice on top just prior to serving.
